title: This Sci-Fi Series Quietly Became Disney+'s Most Acclaimed Show of 2025
text: Andor Season 2 has emerged as the most critically acclaimed series on Disney+ in 2025, despite debuting quietly. The show achieved a 97% on Rotten Tomatoes and became the highest-rated installment of any Star Wars show, surpassing other franchise entries. Andor distinguishes itself within the Star Wars universe by avoiding Jedi-centric narratives and instead exploring the moral complexities of the Rebellion. Season 2 deepens this approach, examining what the characters are willing to sacrifice for the Rebel cause: their reputation, their morality, and in some cases their lives. The series earned significant recognition at major award ceremonies, including Emmy nominations for writing, production design, and visual effects. However, the author suggests the show has faded from cultural conversation since concluding, possibly because it was designed as a finite story with no upcoming seasons planned, allowing it to reach the conclusion it deserved.
